account_id.description: Primary simulated account identifier served by this gateway instance.

mock_balances.description: Initial balances in SYMBOL:QTY comma-separated format.

fill_delay_ms.description: Artificial fill delay applied before simulator matches are published.

match_policy.description: Deterministic matching policy used by the simulator.

admin_grpc_port.description: Dedicated admin gRPC port for simulator-only controls.

enable_admin_controls.description: Expose GatewaySimulatorAdminService for operator and test-harness workflows.
